summary: SSE Toast Notifications feature testing completed successfully. All backend tests (10/10) passed. Frontend toast notifications verified working on Dashboard, Members, Treasury, and Speakers pages. Self-update suppression confirmed working. Silent fetch (no loading spinner) verified.
passed_tests: Backend - SSE payload includes sender (X-Client-Id) for attendance updates
Backend - SSE payload includes action, prenume, nume, prezent, taxa for attendance
Backend - SSE payload includes sender and details for member create
Backend - SSE payload includes sender and details for member delete
Backend - SSE payload includes sender, suma, explicatii for treasury create
Backend - SSE payload includes sender and details for speaker add
Backend - SSE payload includes sender and details for guest add
Backend - Middleware correctly extracts X-Client-Id header
Backend - Empty sender when X-Client-Id header missing
Frontend - Dashboard: Toast appears for external attendance update ('Elena Vasilescu, absent, taxa 42 RON')
Frontend - Dashboard: Silent fetch updates UI without loading spinner
Frontend - Dashboard: Self-update suppression works (no toast for own changes)
Frontend - Members: Toast appears for external member create ('Membru nou: TEST_TOAST NewMember')
Frontend - Members: Silent fetch adds new member to table automatically
Frontend - Toaster component renders in top-right position
Frontend - All pages load correctly (Dashboard, Members, Speakers, Treasury, Settings)

dashboard.test: External attendance update with X-Client-Id: 'external-test-user-999' triggered toast 'Elena Vasilescu, absent, taxa 42 RON'

members.test: External member create with X-Client-Id: 'external-member-creator-777' triggered toast 'Membru nou: TEST_TOAST NewMember'

self_update_suppression.test: Changes made from same browser tab do NOT trigger toast (sender === CLIENT_ID check works)

silent_fetch.test: SSE-triggered updates do NOT show loading spinner - data appears instantly

implementation_details_verified.backend_middleware: X-Client-Id header extracted via middleware and stored in ContextVar
implementation_details_verified.frontend_client_id: CLIENT_ID generated per tab: Math.random().toString(36).slice(2) + Date.now().toString(36)
implementation_details_verified.axios_header: X-Client-Id header set on all axios requests via axios.defaults.headers.common
implementation_details_verified.sse_handler: useRealtimeSync parses JSON event.data and passes to callback with sender field
implementation_details_verified.toast_library: sonner library with Toaster component in App.js position='top-right'

seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing was cleaned up (TEST_TOAST members, treasury entries, speakers deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE Toast Notifications feature is fully working. Key implementation: 1) Backend uses contextvars to capture X-Client-Id from request headers and include it as 'sender' in SSE broadcast payloads. 2) Frontend generates random CLIENT_ID per tab and sends via X-Client-Id header. 3) When SSE event received, callback checks if data.sender === CLIENT_ID - if yes, skips (own action). If different, does silent fetch (no loading=true) and shows toast. 4) Toast uses sonner library with Toaster in App.js position='top-right'. 5) To test cross-client sync: use curl with '-H X-Client-Id: test-external' to simulate external change.
